overall.description: Nighttime first-person walk through an urban commercial district in a game engine (resembling GTA V), featuring warm sodium street lighting, a prominent turquoise mural wall with 'VENICE' lettering, and a building with distinctive red neon archway signage. The camera moves steadily along sidewalks and crosses intersections in a sparse-traffic environment.

street intersection with traffic lights and crosswalk markings

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on a sidewalk at night, walking past a utility pole toward an intersection. The camera crosses the street around the 8-second mark, moving from one sidewalk to another in a quiet urban environment with minimal pedestrian or vehicle activity.

segments.scene_description: Walking along a sidewalk bordered by industrial shipping containers on the right, the camera moves past parked cars as a large turquoise wall gradually enters the frame on the left. The environment remains quiet and empty of pedestrians.

segments.scene_description: The turquoise mural wall dominates the left side of the frame, featuring a large VENICE mural. The camera approaches and passes a building entrance marked by a bright red neon archway where several pedestrians are gathered. A white sports car is parked along the curb near the mural.

ego crosses the intersection, moving from sidewalk to crosswalk and back to sidewalk

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at the intersection and continuing down the road

entered.detail: low-rise commercial buildings with storefronts and signage lining the street
traffic signal pole with lights changing from red to green

segments.scene_description: The camera crosses the street at an intersection as the traffic light changes from red to green. The turquoise mural and neon archway recede behind as the view opens to commercial buildings on the right and the continuation of the urban street ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a quiet urban commercial district that transitions from a sparse industrial area into a vibrant, neon-lit streetscape. It begins on a nighttime sidewalk, moving past a utility pole and crossing a quiet intersection into a desolate stretch of road. As the camera proceeds, the environment shifts toward an industrial zone bordered by shipping containers and parked cars, while a massive turquoise wall gradually emerges on the left. The scene then opens up as the camera passes the prominent VENICE mural and a bright red neon archway where a small group of pedestrians has gathered near a white sports car. Finally, the camera crosses another intersection as the traffic light turns green, leaving the colorful mural and neon lights behind to reveal a vista of commercial buildings stretching down the urban street.
